hero.newSubtitle: Crafted templates that turn your wedding announcement into an unforgettable first impression. One elegant link, infinite memories.
hero.title: Create Your Perfect
hero.subtitle: Share your love story with a beautiful, personalized wedding website. Manage RSVPs, showcase photos, and create lasting memories with your guests.

demo.invitedToCelebrate: You are invited to celebrate the union of
demo.joinUsSpecialDay: Join us on our special day
demo.storyParagraph1: Aisha and Kamol met through a mutual friend's dinner party on a warm Tashkent evening. One conversation led to another — about art, music, late-night walks through the old city.
demo.storyParagraph2: Soon they were inseparable. Their love grew quietly and surely, like the first light of dawn, until one perfect evening under a sky full of stars, Kamol asked the question they both always knew was coming.
